html:
Exclusive to:

“Can be repaired using the inventory wall items.

Can be build up 4 levels.”

-for Structure

The Moon Rock Wall is a Wall exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in A New Reign. It can be crafted by using an Alchemy Engine at the cost of 4 Moon Rocks.

With 600 maximum, Moon Rock Walls' health is between the Stone Wall and Thulecite Wall. Hammering a segment at 50% health will only drop 1 moon rock, it's not possible to rebuild walls without cost in the raw material, as it is for Stone and Thulecite walls. It is also more economical to repair these walls with Moon Rocks (40 HP per rock, 120 for 3 rocks), instead of wall pieces (100 HP per item).

It takes 25 hits to tear down each segment with a Hammer, compared to 3 hits for many other walls. A brand new hammer will only destroy 3 segmentes of Moon Rock Walls before it breaks. Because of this, they can serve as a wall for other players. When attacked by a player, the wall takes only 75% of the player's damage output. Damage taken from mobs is unaffected.

  • 1 Skins
  • 2 Trivia

  • 4 Gallery

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Elegant Moonlit Victorian Wall skin was introduced during the official Year of the Beefalo event in 2021.
Woven - Elegant
Victorian Collection
Moonlit Victorian Wall
Stately and resplendent, like the moon itself.

Trivia

  • In the A Little Fixer Upper update, the textures for Moon Rocks and all related items were updated.

  • Phase 3 Type 2 90°

  • Destroyed 90°

“Spacey and smooth!”
–Wilson, Examining a moon rock wall.
“Safe for now.”
–Willow, Examining a moon rock wall.
“Rock of moon protects Wolfgang.”
–Wolfgang, Examining a moon rock wall.
“The moon... she whispers promises of protection to me.”
–Wendy, Examining a moon rock wall.
“WELCOME TO THE WX-78 MOONBASE”
–WX-78, Examining a moon rock wall.
“A job well done.”
–Wickerbottom, Examining a moon rock wall.
“Looks nice'n'sturdy.”
–Woodie, Examining a moon rock wall.
“I like to build walls between myself and the world.”
–Maxwell, Examining a moon rock wall.
“Incredibly stable. But I question it is from the earth's satellite.”
–Wagstaff, Examining a moon rock wall.
“Whölly impregnable, a wörthy förtificatiön!”
–Wigfrid, Examining a moon rock wall.
“We feel safe behind this wall... it makes us sleepy...”
–Webber, Examining a moon rock wall.
“I do kind of wish it was made of cheese."”
–Warly, Examining a moon rock wall.
“IT BE NAUGHT LIKE INCONSIST'NT MOON”
–Wilba, Examining a moon rock wall.
“Hard”
–Wormwood, Examining a moon rock wall.
“It's already been built. Sigh.”
–Winona, Examining a moon rock wall.
“To keep you out, or keep me in?”
–Wortox, Examining a moon rock wall.
“Moon wall!”
–Wurt, Examining a moon rock wall.
“It came from another world!”
–Walter, Examining a moon rock wall.
“I'd like to see anything break through that! Actually no, I wouldn't.”
–Wanda, Examining a moon rock wall.
“Can be repaired using the inventory wall items.
Can be build up 4 levels.”
-for Structure

It is also more economical to repair these walls with Moon Rocks (40 HP per rock, 120 for 3 rocks), instead of wall pieces (100 HP per item).
It takes 25 hits to tear down each segment with a Hammer, compared to 3 hits for many other walls. A brand new hammer will only destroy 3 segmentes of Moon Rock Walls before it breaks.
